problem_solved: Patients face transportation barriers preventing access to medical appointments, leading to missed care and poor health outcomes especially for Medicaid/Medicare populations
solution_description: Non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) platform providing 35M+ rides per year with 98%+ on-time completion rate. Combines technology platform with logistics network for reliable transportation to healthcare appointments. Also offers remote patient monitoring services
notes: Major NEMT player serving Medicaid plans, Medicare SNP plans, and health systems. 40-60% reduction in ER utilization for engaged members. 47% PMPM cost reduction for high-risk members. Expanded into remote patient monitoring
